Class Turn_End_Card

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.Abstract.Card
it.polimi.Abstract.Building
it.polimi.Buildings.Turn_End_Card
public class Turn_End_Card extends Building
Represents a building that provides an effect triggered at the end of a round or turn. Typically, this effect allows the player to draw an additional card from the deck.

  • Constructor Summary

    Description

  • Constructor Details

    • Turn_End_Card

      public Turn_End_Card(Era era, Position position, int cost, int points)
      Constructs a Turn_End_Card building with the specified properties.
      Parameters:
      era - the era the building belongs to
      position - the position on the board
      cost - the resource cost to build
      points - the prestige points awarded by the building

  • Method Details

    • applyCardEffect

      public void applyCardEffect()
      Applies the end-of-turn effect. This method is responsible for granting the player an additional card from the deck.
      Overrides:
      applyCardEffect in class Building
